pages.text: You can "name" Importers and Exporters for easy organization:$(br2)$(li)Hold any item (e.g., Coal) $(li)Right-click an Importer/Exporter $(li)That gate is now named after the item$(br2)$(bold)Example$(): $(li)Right-click Importer with Coal → Shows as "Coal Importer" in GUI $(li)Right-click Exporter with Iron Ingot → Shows as "Iron Ingot Exporter"$(br2)This does not change functionality, just makes it easier to identify gates.
